## Summary

- **What changed?**


- **What is now true that was not true before?** (behavior, docs, or explicit “still partial” labels)


- **How was it verified?** (commands, manual steps, or “docs-only — N/A”)


- **What remains external or machine-local?** (secrets, OpenClaw paths, services not started by CI)


- **Risk / rollback** (optional; e.g. doc-only vs runtime)


---
